CustomField.description: Select the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where this location is physically situated. This value is used for geographic filtering, business rule evaluation, regulatory compliance, and reporting across the organization.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the 2-letter ISO country code for this location (e.g., FR for France, DE for Germany, UK for United Kingdom). This field drives all country-specific rules, pricing, and configurations.
CustomField.label: Country Code
